title: Keep agent skills required in doctor
selected_option: Keep configured Jig Codex skills as a required global doctor check.
rationale: The repo config declares agent tooling as required setup, and the existing adoption docs state agent doctor exits nonzero until required setup is complete. The current local failure is a user-level Codex marketplace registration issue, not a product defect in this change.
alternatives: Make agent skills optional in global doctor.
Add a new config switch for doctor-required agent tooling.
